data.title: Amentum-Led Joint Venture Secures $406 Million Contract as Owner’s Engineer for UK’s First Small Modular Reactors
data.description: Great British Energy – Nuclear (GBE-N) has recently granted a $406 million (£300 million) contract to a partnership between Amentum and Cavendish Nuclear to act as the owner's engineer for the UK's pioneering small modular reactor (SMR) initiative. This extensive agreement, lasting up to 14 years, aims to facilitate the implementation of Rolls-Royce SMR's progressive reactor technology at the Wylfa site in North Wales. The substantial contract signifies a significant milestone in advancing nuclear energy technology in the region.

data.title: MSC Industrial Direct Likely To Report Higher Q2 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: MSC Industrial Direct Co., Inc. is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on April 1st, with analysts predicting earnings of 84 cents per share (up from 72 cents per share last year). The company, headquartered in Melville, New York, is expected to report quarterly revenue of $931.83 million, compared to $891.72 million in the previous year. MSC Industrial Supply recently declared a cash dividend of 87 cents per share. As of Tuesday, the company's shares rose by 2.6% to close at $92.27. For more details, including the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: DOT aims $1.35 by mid-April with 2.71% gain, eyeing $1.50+. Technicals hint at a bounce with $1.24 support crucial.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is aiming to surpass the resistance level of $1.35 after experiencing a 2.71% increase in value in a single day. Analysis of its technical indicators indicates a possible uptrend to reach $1.50 or higher if buyers can sustain the current momentum above the support level of $1.24.

data.title: ThunderX Adopts SAFERTOS® to Enhance Functional Safety in Next-Generation AI Domain Controller Platforms to Accelerate Safe, Scalable Cockpit-ADAS Fusion on Qualcomm Automotive SoCs
data.description: In Bristol, England on April 1, 2026, ThunderX, a worldwide company specializing in intelligent driving domain controller platforms and high-performance central computing solutions, revealed its strategic decision to incorporate SAFERTOS® by WITTENSTEIN high integrity systems (WHIS) into its operations. This move is part of ThunderX's efforts to enhance its offerings and boost performance.

data.title: NSSK Closes Series IV Funds at JPY 250 Billion Hardcap, More Than 2x Oversubscribed
data.description: Within four months of its launch, a significant amount of funds was allocated by Nippon Sangyo Suishin Kiko (NSSK), a prominent private equity firm in Japan. The firm was exclusively advised by Thrive Alternatives. On April 1, 2026, NSSK completed the final close of NSSK Series IV Funds.

data.title: IOWN Global Forum Showcased Vision for Future AI Networking at OFC 2026
data.description: In Los Angeles, the IOWN Global Forum, consisting of more than 180 member organizations, showcased its vision for the future of open AI networking at OFC 2026. Through an interactive booth and dedicated panel session, the Forum illustrated the potential of interoperable technologies. By engaging industry leaders, they emphasized how collaboration can speed up the advancement of open ecosystems and foster innovation in AI.

data.title: NTG Nordic Transport Group (“NTG”) announces the appointment of Carsten Trolle as CEO of its Air & Ocean division
data.description: NTG has recently appointed Carsten Trolle as the CEO of its Air & Ocean division. With over 40 years of experience in managing and expanding multinational air and ocean operations, Carsten served as the CEO of Air & Sea at DSV from 2015 to 2024. This decision marks an important strategic move for NTG as they aim to leverage Carsten's expertise to drive growth and success in their Air & Ocean division.

data.title: Virtune strengthens its Nordic presence by appointing a Country Manager for Finland
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Virtune, a prominent Swedish digital asset manager, revealed the appointment of Niclas Bagge as the Country Manager for Finland. This move signifies a strategic decision in Virtune's expansion in the Nordics and highlights their dedication to providing accessible, secure, and transparent crypto investment opportunities. Virtune aims to cater to both institutional and retail investors as they continue to grow their presence in the region.

data.title: Polygon (MATIC) aims for $0.45 rebound by month-end. Currently at $0.38 with $0.42 pivotal level for recovery.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently priced at $0.38 and is showing neutral RSI and bearish MACD signals. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility of a recovery towards the $0.45 resistance level if bulls are able to regain the $0.42 pivot level in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Lamb Weston Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on April 1. Analysts predict the Eagle, Idaho-based company will post earnings of 61 cents per share, down from $1.10 per share a year ago. The consensus revenue estimate for the quarter is $1.49 billion, slightly lower than the $1.52 billion reported last year. In the second quarter, the company saw a 1% year-over-year increase in net sales to $1.62 billion, beating the estimated $1.59 billion. On Tuesday, Lamb Weston's shares rose by 3.2% to close at $42.26. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Dogecoin aims to break $0.10 resistance by mid-April 2026. Currently trading at $0.09, DOGE has neutral RSI at 49.01. Momentum could push it to $0.10 in 2 weeks.
data.description: The current trading price of Dogecoin is $0.09, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 49.01. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility that DOGE might reach the $0.10 resistance level in the next two weeks if the market sentiment turns bullish.
